title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
text: Middle East escalation drives safe-haven demand — JPY COT LF net short −65,309 (crowded carry). USD/JPY at 158.85; safe-haven bid competes with 450bp Fed-BoJ carry differential. Risk-off flow historically unwinds JPY shorts — watch 157.00 as the first technical level on a sustained risk-off move.

title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Vol
text: AUD LF net long +41,675 (CFTC, week ending Apr 14), long%=72.0% — extreme positioning. HV30 at 6.5%, ATM IV (FXE chain) at 8.2% — options pricing a 1.7 vol-pt premium over realized. AUD/USD at 0.7177; late-trend caution signal as price stalling near highs. Watch for LF delta turning negative to inva

title: EUR/USD — COT + Technical
text: EUR LF net short −72 (CFTC, week ending Apr 14), long%=50.0% — neutral positioning. EUR/USD at 1.1787; testing 1.1800 resistance. ECB's Lagarde comments on Iran conflict risks — market hedging rather than chasing. Watch 1.1850 for confirmation of breakout.

title: GBP/USD — CB + Technical
text: BoE 4.50% vs Fed 3.75% — 75bp GBP carry premium supports the pair structurally. GBP LF net long +28,426 (CFTC, week ending Apr 14); positioning aligned with carry. GBP/USD at 1.3536; mid-range, next resistance at 1.3600. ATM IV 9.5% near HV — options neutral.

title: AUD/NZD — Retail Sentiment
text: AUD/NZD: 9% long / 91% short — retail heavily positioned. Watch for contrarian squeeze. NZD/USD at 0.5892; cross-asset move driven by risk sentiment.
